# Figures

This section is driven by `catalog/figures.csv`. When the assessment pipeline
or a local analysis places matching report-ready figures in the configured
figure folders, the figure and caption are inserted automatically. Missing
figures remain visible as TODO items so the report can render before every
assessment figure is available.

```{r figure-catalog, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
manual_figures_qmd_path <- clean_text(get0("manual_figures_qmd", ifnotfound = ""))
manual_figures_qmd_active <- FALSE
if (nzchar(manual_figures_qmd_path) && file.exists(manual_figures_qmd_path)) {
  manual_figures_qmd_lines <- readLines(manual_figures_qmd_path, warn = FALSE)
  manual_figures_qmd_text <- trimws(manual_figures_qmd_lines)
  manual_figures_qmd_text <- manual_figures_qmd_text[nzchar(manual_figures_qmd_text)]
  manual_figures_qmd_text <- manual_figures_qmd_text[!grepl("^<!--|-->$", manual_figures_qmd_text)]
  manual_figures_qmd_active <- length(manual_figures_qmd_text) > 0
}

if (manual_figures_qmd_active) {
  cat(knitr::knit_child(manual_figures_qmd_path, quiet = TRUE), sep = "\n")
} else {
  figure_catalog <- read_catalog("figures")
  figure_curation <- read_figure_curation()
  figure_roots <- report_paths("figure_roots", c("Figures/generated", "Figures/static", "Figures"))
  emit_catalog_figures(figure_catalog, roots = figure_roots, curation = figure_curation, placements = "main")
  emit_curated_file_figures(figure_curation, catalog = figure_catalog, roots = figure_roots, placements = "main", default_section = "Curated generated figures", id_prefix = "curated")
  curated_catalog <- apply_figure_curation(figure_catalog, figure_curation)
  appendix_catalog <- filter_catalog_figures(curated_catalog, placements = "appendix")
  if (nrow(appendix_catalog)) {
    cat("\n# Appendix: Curated Supplemental Figures\n\n")
    emit_catalog_figures(appendix_catalog, roots = figure_roots, placements = "appendix", empty_todo = FALSE)
  }
  emit_curated_file_figures(figure_curation, catalog = figure_catalog, roots = figure_roots, placements = "appendix", default_section = "Curated supplemental generated figures", id_prefix = "curated-supplement")
  emit_extra_generated_figures(figure_catalog, roots = report_paths("extra_figure_roots", c("Figures/generated")), curation = figure_curation)
}
```
